## Verification

<!-- How you know it works. Test output, curl results, screenshots,
     Lighthouse scores, whatever. -->

- [ ] Lint clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test:ci`)
- [ ] Build clean (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Docs regenerated (`npm run docs:update` — auto via `prebuild`)
